strengths: ~17 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, meeting the 15-year minimum
Genuine entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective (2016–present), an open-source geo-data platform in active production use
Recent hands-on work with agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing awareness of the AI-agent ecosystem
concerns: AI expertise is effectively 2 months old (April 2025 to present); no prior ML/AI engineering roles, no AI products built at scale, and no recognized publications or platforms in the AI space
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and no evidence of deep cloud platform expertise beyond AWS CDK usage and Kubernetes deployments
Career trajectory and titles top out at 'Senior/Staff Software Developer' with no evidence of director-level IC scope, strategic customer advisory work, or organizational influence at scale
response.justification: The role is a director-level IC position requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and the ability to advise strategic customers on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption. Szabo's only AI-relevant experience is ~2 months of MCP tooling work at re:cinq, with no prior ML/AI engineering history, no AI products shipped at meaningful scale, and no advanced degree in the field. His broad polyglot engineering background (MIT CS, ~17 years of experience, founder experience) demonstrates genuine technical competence, but the core competency gaps in AI depth and strategic leadership scope are disqualifying for this specific role at this seniority level.
